# Palengkee

> Multi-vendor marketplace for fresh produce, local essentials, and everyday goods - direct from Filipino communities to your door.

## Key features
- Browse fresh produce, local essentials, and everyday goods from Filipino vendors
- Multi-vendor marketplace platform with vendor storefronts
- Real-time messaging between buyers and vendors
- Order tracking and management
- Secure checkout with cash on delivery
- Vendor dashboard for managing listings, orders, and analytics

## Pages
- Homepage: / — Overview of marketplace, featured listings, vendor spotlight
- Listings: /listings — Browse all products with search and filters
- Vendors: /vendors/[id] — Individual vendor storefronts
- About: /about — About Palengkee
- Cart: /cart — Shopping cart
- Checkout: /checkout — Order checkout

## Tech stack
Next.js 16, Prisma ORM, SQLite/Turso, next-intl (EN/TL), Tailwind CSS v4, Framer Motion
